"# franken_ocr tokenizer conformance corpus."
"# Format: ONE test case per line. Each line is a JSON-encoded string"
"# (the exact output of json.dumps(text, ensure_ascii=False)). Lines whose"
"# decoded value begins with '#' AND contains no other content are treated as"
"# comments and skipped. Blank lines are skipped. To test a string that begins"
"# with '#', it is fine -- a JSON-encoded '#...' line is NOT a comment unless"
"# the raw line itself (before JSON-decoding) starts with a literal '#'."
"# See README.md in this directory for the conformance contract."
"# --- 1. ASCII / English prose ---"
"Hello, world!"
"The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog."
"Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs."
"OCR stands for Optical Character Recognition."
"franken_ocr is a pure-Rust port of Baidu Unlimited-OCR."
"# --- 2. Leading / trailing / repeated whitespace edge cases ---"
" leading single space"
"  leading double space"
"\t leading tab then space"
"trailing single space "
"trailing double space  "
"trailing tab\t"
"a  b   c    d"
"word\ttab\tseparated\tvalues"
"   "
"\t\t\t"
"\n"
"\n\n"
"\r\n"
"line one\nline two\nline three"
"trailing newline\n"
"crlf line one\r\ncrlf line two\r\n"
"mixed\r\n\n\r line breaks"
"\n   leading newline then spaces"
"word \n space-before-newline"
"   \n   spaces around newline   \n   "
"# --- 3. Digit grouping (pre-tokenizer Split \\p{N}{1,3} -> groups of 1-3) ---"
"0"
"00"
"000"
"0000"
"12"
"123"
"1234"
"12345"
"123456"
"1234567"
"12345678901234567890"
"3.14159265358979"
"Phone: +1 (800) 555-0199 ext. 4242"
"Total: $1,234,567.89 USD"
"Page 1 of 100, section 42.7.3"
"Year 2026, ISBN 978-3-16-148410-0"
"0x1F4A9 and 0b1010 and 0o755"
"١٢٣٤٥ arabic-indic digits"
"# --- 4. Punctuation, symbols, math, LaTeX ---"
"a+b=c, x-y*z/w"
"f(x) = x^2 + 2*x + 1"
"E = mc^2"
"\\frac{a}{b} + \\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}"
"$\\int_0^\\infty e^{-x^2}\\,dx = \\frac{\\sqrt{\\pi}}{2}$"
"\\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \\frac{n(n+1)}{2}"
"\\begin{align} a &= b + c \\\\ d &= e - f \\end{align}"
"\\alpha \\beta \\gamma \\delta \\epsilon \\theta \\lambda \\mu \\pi \\sigma \\omega"
"\\nabla \\cdot \\mathbf{E} = \\frac{\\rho}{\\varepsilon_0}"
"A \\subseteq B \\cup C, x \\in \\mathbb{R}, \\forall \\epsilon > 0"
"P(A|B) = \\frac{P(B|A)P(A)}{P(B)}"
"matrix: \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix}"
"∀x∈ℝ, x²≥0 ∧ √x·√x=x"
"α+β=γ, ∑∫∞∂∇±×÷≠≤≥≈∝"
"# --- 5. Code samples ---"
"def f(x):\n    return x * 2"
"fn main() { println!(\"Hello, {}!\", name); }"
"let v: Vec<u8> = (0..=255).collect();"
"if (a && b) || !c { return Ok(()); }"
"impl<T: Clone + Send> Iterator for Foo<T> where T: 'static {}"
"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ? AND name LIKE '%abc%';"
"#![forbid(unsafe_code)]\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct S;"
"std::collections::HashMap<String, Vec<(i32, f64)>>"
"x = [a for a in range(10) if a % 2 == 0]"
"const RE = /[a-z0-9_]+@[a-z0-9.]+/gi;"
"git commit -m \"fix: handle edge case\" --no-verify"
"</div><span class=\"x\" data-id='42'>&amp;&lt;&gt;</span>"
"{\"key\": [1, 2, {\"nested\": true}], \"u\": null}"
"camelCaseWord PascalCaseWord snake_case_word SCREAMING_SNAKE kebab-case-word"
"# --- 6. CJK: Chinese (split by [一-龥]+ pre-tokenizer stage) ---"
"你好，世界！"
"光学字符识别是一项重要的技术。"
"中文混合English和数字123的文本。"
"繁體中文：這是一個測試。"
"百度Unlimited-OCR模型。"
"# --- 7. CJK: Japanese (Hiragana ぀-ゟ, Katakana ゠-ヿ isolated) ---"
"こんにちは、世界。"
"ひらがなとカタカナと漢字が混ざる。"
"コンピューターでOCRを実行する。"
"日本語のテキストを認識します。"
"あいうえおアイウエオ一二三"
"# --- 8. CJK: Korean (Hangul, outside the CJK pre-tokenizer ranges) ---"
"안녕하세요, 세계!"
"광학 문자 인식은 중요한 기술입니다."
"한국어 텍스트와 English가 섞인 문장."
"가나다라마바사아자차카타파하"
"# --- 9. Other scripts & emoji (full byte-level coverage, no UNK) ---"
"Привет, мир! Русский текст."
"مرحبا بالعالم (Arabic, RTL)"
"שלום עולם (Hebrew, RTL)"
"हैलो दुनिया (Devanagari)"
"สวัสดีชาวโลก (Thai)"
"Ελληνικά (Greek)"
"emoji: 😀 🚀 👍 🌍 🤖 ❤️"
"flags: 🇺🇸 🇯🇵 zwj: 👩‍💻"
"combining: áèîõü ñ"
"# --- 10. DeepSeek glyph specials (fullwidth bar U+FF5C, bullet U+2581) ---"
"<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>"
"<｜end▁of▁sentence｜>"
"<｜▁pad▁｜>"
"<｜User｜>"
"<｜Assistant｜>"
"<｜fim▁begin｜>middle<｜fim▁hole｜>suffix<｜fim▁end｜>"
"<｜tool▁calls▁begin｜><｜tool▁call▁begin｜><｜tool▁call▁end｜><｜tool▁calls▁end｜>"
"<｜place▁holder▁no₁0｜>"
"prefix <｜begin▁of▁sentence｜> suffix"
"# --- 11. ASCII-pipe specials and OCR / vision / grounding / table glyphs ---"
"<|User|>"
"<|Assistant|>"
"<|User|>Read the document.<|Assistant|>"
"<image>"
"<|ref|>title<|/ref|><|det|>[[10, 20, 300, 400]]<|/det|>"
"<|grounding|>Convert the document to markdown."
"<td>cell</td><tr></tr>"
"<table><tr><td>A</td><td>B</td></tr></table>"
"<|EOT|>"
"text <image> text <|ref|>x<|/ref|> text"
"<|User|><image>\n<|grounding|>OCR this.<|Assistant|>"
"# --- 12. Adjacency / boundary stress (specials touching text and digits) ---"
"a<image>b"
"123<image>456"
"<image><image><image>"
"中文<image>日本語"
"<|ref|><|det|><|/det|><|/ref|>"
"no space<|Assistant|>no space"
"<｜User｜><|User|>"
"</td></tr><td><tr>"
"# --- 13. Single chars, empties, and BPE-merge stress ---"
""
" "
"a"
"Ġ"
"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"
"the the the the the the the the"
"............"
"!!!!!!!!"
"________"
"            "
"abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"
"!\"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\\]^_`{|}~"
"      various unicode spaces"
"zero​width​space​joined"
"# --- 14. Realistic OCR document snippets (mixed everything) ---"
"Invoice #2026-0042\nDate: 2026-06-24\nTotal: ¥1,234,567\n中文说明：请付款。"
"Theorem 1. For all $n \\in \\mathbb{N}$, $\\sum_{k=1}^{n} k^3 = \\left(\\frac{n(n+1)}{2}\\right)^2$."
"| Name | 年齢 | Score |\n|------|------|-------|\n| Alice | 30 | 95.5 |\n| 张三 | 25 | 88.0 |"
"第1章 Introduction（1.1）\nThis chapter 介绍了 the basics.\n```python\nx = 1  # comment 注释\n```"
"<|grounding|><|ref|>标题<|/ref|><|det|>[[0, 0, 999, 50]]<|/det|>\n# Heading标题\n\nBody text 正文 with $\\pi \\approx 3.14$."
